security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https: http: data: asset:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Route running applications into one Discord Rich Presence.
bundle.longDescription: ActivityMux is a cross-platform Discord Rich Presence controller with presets, process rules, deterministic priorities, persistent timers, and manual overrides.
